text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of a long and arduous
journey in the Twinkle Series for me and my
trainee. Her name is...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm Air Shakur. Just to be clear, I'm not expecting
anything from you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Don't get me wrong, I'll hear out any advice you
have, but I'll be the one calling the shots. Make
sure to get that into your head.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and if you get in my way, for any reason at
all, I'm ending our contract right there on the
spot. Got that? Good.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begin my days challenging the Twinkle
Series with <chrname>!
